name: Ratatouille
recipeIngredient: 4 large red ripe tomatoes, peeled, seeded, and sliced
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine eggplant slices, zucchini slices, and green pepper slices in a large oven-safe bowl. Sprinkle with 1 tablespoon of salt and pour 1 quart of boiling water over the vegetables. Let stand for 10 minutes, drain, and pat dry.
2. In a large skillet, cook the onions and garlic cloves in olive oil until softened.
3. Spread onion mixture on the bottom of an oiled shallow 2-quart baking dish.
4. Arrange half the vegetable mixture on top of the onion mixture and spread with half the tomato slices. Sprinkle tomatoes with 1 tablespoon Parmesan, 1/2 teaspoon basil, and season to taste with salt and pepper.
5. Arrange the remaining vegetables and tomatoes in layers in the baking dish, seasoning them with 1/2 teaspoon basil and salt and pepper to taste.
6. Sprinkle with remaining Parmesan and bread crumbs and drizzle with olive oil.
7. Bake at 400°F for 45 minutes.
